plan.title: Migrate product slash commands to /deft:directive:* with aliases

narratives.Description: Resolve the #418 tail under the #1670 model: migrate product-level slash commands from /deft:* to /deft:directive:* with retained aliases + deprecation notes, while cross-product commands that operate on shared vBRIEF abstractions (/deft:continue, /deft:checkpoint) stay at the umbrella /deft:*. Skills stay deft-directive-* (no rename). Source edits go through templates/agents-entry.md + content/commands.md, then `task agents:refresh` regenerates AGENTS.md, honoring the #1309 template-propagation discipline.
narratives.ImplementationPlan:
1. Edit the command-surface source files content/commands.md and templates/agents-entry.md to define product commands under /deft:directive:* (change, run:<strategy>, ...), keep /deft:continue + /deft:checkpoint at the umbrella level, and document the old forms as deprecation-warning aliases.
2. Run the agents-refresh CLI (`task agents:refresh`) to regenerate the AGENTS.md managed-section from the template file and confirm the managed-section contract test passes.
3. Verify with the content/skills tests + the agents-entry contract test (tests/content/test_agents_entry_contract.py) that the new namespace + retained aliases are present and the cross-product commands remain at /deft:*.
narratives.UserStory: As a directive user, I want product commands namespaced under /deft:directive:* (with old aliases still working), so that the command surface matches the deft-directive-* skills and leaves room for sibling-product command namespaces.

narrative.Acceptance: Given the migration, when commands.md/agents-entry are inspected, then product commands appear under /deft:directive:* and the prior /deft:* forms are documented as deprecation-warning aliases.
When the command surface is inspected, then /deft:continue and /deft:checkpoint remain at the umbrella /deft:* level (not migrated).
When `task agents:refresh` runs and the agents-entry contract test executes, then AGENTS.md reflects the new namespace and the managed-section contract test passes.

verify_commands: pnpm -w run build && node packages/cli/dist/bin.js verify links
expected_outputs: Product slash commands under /deft:directive:* with retained aliases
AGENTS.md regenerated; agents-entry contract test green
swarm.missing_traces_justification: Resolves #418 (command namespace tail) under the #1670 model / #1669 Wave 2; documentation+template surface with no spec-section trace.

references.title: Issue #11: NPM + PIP CLI distribution (`npm i -g @deftai/directive`, `pipx install deft-cli`)
